product_overview: A role-based devotee management and attendance platform for ISKCON communities. It provides secure login, personalized dashboards, devotee record management, event attendance tracking, and public check-in support.
core_goals: Authenticate as a User, Mentor, or Owner and access the appropriate dashboard
View role-specific event and devotee information from a centralized dashboard
Manage devotee records for outreach and directory maintenance
Track attendance for events through internal and public check-in flows
Review event details, attendance activity, and devotee profile history

features.name: Role-Based Authentication
features.description: Users can sign in with their assigned role and access the app based on their permissions.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select the User tab -> Enter the user ID -> Enter the password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the role-based dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Select the Mentor tab -> Enter the mentor ID -> Enter the password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the role-based dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Select the Owner tab -> Start owner sign-in -> Complete the OAuth popup -> See the owner dashboard

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated users see a dashboard tailored to their role with relevant stats, events, and navigation options.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the dashboard content for the signed-in role -> Review stats and event information -> Use the sidebar to move to other available sections
Navigate to / -> View the dashboard content for the signed-in role -> Log out from the sidebar -> Return to the login page

features.name: Devotee Database Management
features.description: Owners can search, add, edit, delete, import, and export devotee records in the database management area.
user_flows: Navigate to /database -> Search for a devotee -> Open a devotee record -> Update the record details -> Save changes -> See the updated devotee entry
Navigate to /database -> Add a new devotee record -> Enter devotee details -> Save the record -> See the devotee appear in the directory
Navigate to /database -> Delete a devotee record -> Confirm the deletion -> See the devotee removed from the active list
Navigate to /database -> Import a CSV file -> Review the imported devotee data -> See the new records added to the database
Navigate to /database -> Export the devotee data -> Download the exported file

features.name: Attendance Management
features.description: Authorized users can mark attendance for devotees, view attendance sheets, and support public check-in for events.
user_flows: Navigate to /attendance -> Search for devotees on the attendance sheet -> Mark devotees as present -> See the attendance state update
Navigate to /events/:id -> View the event details -> Review attendance information for the event -> Mark attendance for assigned devotees -> See the updated attendance status
Navigate to /public-attendance/:id -> Open the public attendance page from a QR code -> Enter the required devotee information -> Submit the check-in form -> See attendance recorded for the event

features.name: Event Detail View
features.description: Authenticated users can open an event to review its details, assignments, and attendance-related information.
user_flows: Navigate to /events/:id -> View the event details -> Review assignments and response information -> See the event-specific attendance status and summary

features.name: Devotee Profile View
features.description: Users can open a devotee profile page to review profile details and history.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile/:id -> View the devotee profile -> Review the devotee's history and notes -> See chanting and contact-related details

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with User ID and password for User/Mentor roles
user_interactions: Click Sign in button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Owner Google Login
features.description: Owner login via Google OAuth popup
user_interactions: Click Sign in as Owner button

features.name: Role-Based Dashboard
features.description: Shows different dashboard based on user role

features.name: Database Management
features.description: Owner manages devotee records with CSV import/export

features.name: Attendance Management
user_interactions: Generate QR code for public check-in

known_limitations.issue: Vite base path set to /Vrinda-app/ breaks local dev at root URL
known_limitations.impact: App only loads at http://localhost:3000/Vrinda-app/ not at root

known_limitations.issue: background.jpg referenced in Login but missing from public folder
known_limitations.impact: Login page background image fails to load

known_limitations.issue: Missing vite/client types in tsconfig causes TypeScript errors for import.meta.env
known_limitations.impact: TypeScript lint fails with TS2339 errors
